creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
(In reply to Marko Cupać from comment #0)

I'm going to ask the obvious question: Have you updated the plugin to the latest version? The stacktrace indicates that it's currently going thru' a compatibility layer.

Aside from that, it's beyond my capability to find out what the problem is. It may or may not be related to general www/webkit2-gtk3 issues. Some people have downgraded to webkit2-gtk3 2.22 to work around webkit2-gtk3 issues with some success.
